content_body:
“The love in our family grows strong and deep; Leaving special moments to treasure and keep.”

Blue Ridge, GA provides an idyllic mountain locale for families to come together and create memorable moments that will be treasured and kept for a lifetime. Catching up with relatives you haven’t seen in ages, relaxing on decked out porches soaking in majestic views, experiencing all that the North Georgia mountains has to offer the adventurous at heart.

Cabin Rentals of Georgia can help you celebrate the beauty of your family. Experience the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway along the Toccoa River and U-Pick fruits at Mercier Orchards or thrill to Class III-IV rapids whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River, and chill at any of North Georgia’s outstanding wineries and vineyards with live music and fire pits. Pleasing every member of your large family gathering is a breeze in Blue Ridge!

Fallen Timber Lodge - Toccoa River in Blue Ridge 

A 5 bedroom/5.5 bath lodge luxuriously appointed with a refined interior offering lofty views of the Toccoa River and Blue Ridge Mountains comfortably sleeps 12 guests. Carved into a gentle hillside overlooking the big waters of the Toccoa River and the Cherokee Indian Fish Trap, revel in the beauty of the area with flora covering the many fallen timbers which once stood tall. Offering majestic views of the river and mountainside, you will feel the pull of the river beckoning you while you imagine the history of the Cherokee Indians from long ago.

As you sit on the covered porches of this cabin, you can hear the rushing waters of the Tocooa River, view the Cherokee Indian Fish Trap, and watch the Blue Ridge Scenic Train go by at less than 10 mph. Enjoy a gently sloping hiking path taking you down to the river’s edge where you can enjoy fishing, tubing, kayaking, or canoeing right from this property into McCaysville. Fallen Timber Lodge is located less than 10 miles from downtown Blue Ridge, and 5 miles to McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN. The popular Ocoee Olympic Whitewater Center is less than 30 minutes away.

Riverview Lodge - Toccoa River in Blue Ridge

Accommodating 11 guests in 5 spacious bedrooms with their own private en suite bathrooms plus a loft area with a futon, this luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental near the Toccoa River is ideal for family reunions. Riverview Lodge is up the hill from Fallen Timber Lodge, offering the same floor plan. Less than ¼ mile down the road is The Rivers Edge.  With so much to do and so many outdoor activities to enjoy, Riverview Lodge is ideally situated 9 miles from Blue Ridge, GA and closer to McCaysville, GA. From shopping to dining, from tubing to whitewater rafting, from winery hopping to mountain hiking, you are sure to find total enjoyment in the North GA mountains. 

While exploring the grounds of this Blue Ridge cabin rental above the Toccoa River, you will find a 200-foot staircase that will take you all the way down the mountain to the railroad tracks that belong to the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway, then across the tracks to the edge of the Toccoa River you can enjoy 650 feet of river frontage property. Take a picnic down to the river and find a picnic table, a gazebo, and a fire pit. You can even cast a line into the Toccoa River right where the Cherokee Indians built their fish trap long ago.

The Rivers Edge - Toccoa River in Blue Ridge

As the Toccoa River uniquely rolls along northward into Tennessee, The Rivers, a Blue Ridge luxury cabin rental in close proximity to Fallen Timber Lodge and Riverview Lodge, is a uniquely beautiful cabin situated slightly above the river with a great view of the Cherokee Indian Fish Trap. A hiking path down to the river's edge is perfect for outdoor exploration and river activities - trout fishing, canoeing, tubing, or kayaking. From your Georgia riverfront cabin, you can listen to the whitewater rapids below and breathe the fresh, clean mountain air right off your spacious covered porches.  Wave to the passengers on the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway as the train slowly passes by during spring, summer, and autumn.

The Rivers Edge is a luxuriously spacious cabin with 5 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, spacious octagonal deck with fireplace, game room with pool table and arcade machine, and comfortably sleeps up to 10 people. With the living areas opening out to 3 levels of spacious covered porches overlooking the river, each level features its own seating areas plus a hot tub on the terrace level, allowing you to experience the outdoors in supreme luxury.

Reserve Your Family Reunion in Blue Ridge Today

Family gatherings in Blue Ridge make the best memories given all the adventures, shopping, restaurants - there are plenty of of activities for both young and old. Cabin Rentals of Georgia offer spacious lodges, most with ensuite bathrooms which provide provide for everyone in your party. Let us plan your special family reunion in Blue Ridge and help you create memories you will treasure forever.
title: 3 Blue Ridge Cabins for Memorable Family Reunions
